zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Dacre於大約1415年出生在英國波藍德納沃斯時，她的父親Sir Thomas Dacre29歲，母親Philippa Neville29歲。她於1429年之前與Sir Thomas Clifford在英國越可爾斯凱爾頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Dacre于大约1415年出生在英国波藍德納沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Dacre29岁，母亲Philippa Neville29岁。她于1429年之前与Sir Thomas Clifford在英国越可爾斯凱爾頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Dacre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Dacre, one in Cumbria, the other in Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Dacre was born about 1415, in Naworth, Cumberland, England, her father, Sir Thomas Dacre, was 29 and her mother, Philippa Neville, was 29. She married Sir Thomas Clifford before 1429, in Skelton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Dacre est née environ 1415, à Naworth, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Dacre, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Philippa Neville, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Clifford avant 1429, à Skelton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Dacre um 1415 in Naworth, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Dacre 29 und ihre Mutter Philippa Neville 29. Sie hat vor 1429 in Skelton, Yorkshire, England Sir Thomas Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Dacre è nata il circa 1415 nel Naworth, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Dacre, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Philippa Neville, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Clifford prima del 1429, nel Skelton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Dacreが約1415年にイギリスクウンバーランドナウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Dacreは29歳，母Philippa Nevilleは29歳であった。1429年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアスケルトンでSir Thomas Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Dacre(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 쿠벌랜드 나워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Dacre(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Neville(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1429년 이전 영국 요르크실르 스켈턴에서 Sir Thomas Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

Conisbrough, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Dacre nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Naworth, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Dacre, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Neville, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Clifford antes 1429, em Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Dacre родилась около 1415 г. в местности наворт, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Dacre было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Neville, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Clifford перед 1429 г. в местности скелтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Dacre nació aproximadamente 1415, en Naworth, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Dacre, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Philippa Neville, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Clifford antes de 1429, en Skelton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
